backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management, user profiles, trending analytics, and role-based access control with admin password authentication. Includes functions for saving/deleting clips, generating AI clip suggestions, and managing user permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and relationships.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Beast Clipping' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and admin route protection with password authentication UI.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with detailed error messages, stack traces, and retry/home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying system statistics cards (total clips, trending clips, analytics) and a trending clips analytics table with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordInp: A form component that validates an admin password and navigates to the admin panel upon successful validation. Displays loading, error, and success states with icons.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a video clip card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality. Includes a confirmation dialog for deletion and visual feedback for selection state.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components. Shows loading state, empty state, and handles clip selection and deletion.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clips with viral scores. Allows users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with timestamp inputs (start/end), title field, and save functionality. Accepts suggested timestamps and titles from external sources.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header containing branding, authentication controls, admin password input, and admin panel navigation. Manages Internet Identity login/logout and admin password validation state.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation functionality. Displays error alerts and loading states for both URL submission and AI clip generation.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling and icons based on score thresholds (high/medium/low). Supports different sizes and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube video player component that embeds a YouTube iframe with responsive 16:9 aspect ratio using the video ID prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
Hook for admin password authentication with session storage persistence. Validates passwords against the backend and manages validation state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor. Uses React Query for caching and error handling.
Hook for AI-powered clip generation that calls the backend and falls back to mock suggestions if none returned. Includes a mock AI function that generates realistic clip suggestions with viral scores.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook for creating video clips with automatic viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics. Invalidates clip queries on successful creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook for fetching all clips and deleting individual clips via the backend actor. Manages loading states and invalidates queries after mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook for managing clip start/end timestamps with minute/second inputs, validation, formatting, and conversion utilities. Provides validation error messages and time range formatting.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with AuthClient integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Empty file placeholder for a hook to check owner permissions.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
Hook providing YouTube URL validation and video ID extraction utilities using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom color scheme with OKLCH colors, container settings, animations, and plugin integrations for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking completed features, known issues (admin panel authentication problems), and architectural notes about transitioning to password-based access control.
